headline: Amazon Prime Day helps consumers stretch their dollars on groceries: VP
summary: Amazon Prime Day (AMZN) is finally here as the 2026 consumer event kicks off on Tuesday and will run through Friday, June 26. Adobe Analytics predicts consumers could spend up to $26 billion in online shopping across this year's Prime Day. Amazon Prime vice president Jamil Ghani discusses the deals and value savings being offered, as well as the e-commerce outlet's practice of dynamic price matching.

content.title: Amazon Prime Day helps consumers stretch their dollars on groceries: VP
content.description:
Amazon Prime Day (AMZN) is finally here as the 2026 consumer event kicks off on Tuesday and will run through Friday, June 26. Adobe Analytics predicts consumers could spend up to $26 billion in online shopping across this year's Prime Day.

Amazon Prime vice president Jamil Ghani discusses the deals and value savings being offered, as well as the e-commerce outlet's practice of dynamic price matching.

headline: Exclusive-SPS Commerce explores sale amid activist pressure, sources say
summary: Supply chain software maker SPS Commerce is exploring a sale amid pressure from ‌activist investors, according to three people familiar with the matter.  The ‌company is working with investment bank Morgan Stanley on the potential sale, which is ​expected to draw interest from private equity firms, the sources said, requesting anonymity to discuss confidential matters.  SPS Commerce and Morgan Stanley did not immediately respond to requests for comment.

SPS Commerce and Morgan Stanley did not immediately respond to requests for comment.

headline: Best Buy seen entering growth phase under incoming CEO, says Jefferies
summary: Best Buy Co Inc (NYSE:BBY) is positioned for a new phase of growth under incoming CEO Jason Bonfig, according to Jefferies analysts, who said that recent discussions with the executive left them increasingly confident in the company’s outlook amid shifting dynamics in consumer...

headline: How Investors May Respond To Best Buy (BBY) CFO Transition And Succession Planning Shift
summary: Best Buy Co., Inc. recently announced that long-time finance leader Matt Bilunas will step down as Senior Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer and Enterprise Strategy, leaving the company on July 31, 2026, with CEO Corie Barry prepared to provide interim financial oversight while an external search identifies a successor with prior CFO experience. These leadership moves come as Best Buy’s board and investors weigh executive succession, governance priorities and evolving...
